name: skills
description: Small, focused Claude Code skills: prose linting (slop-cop), second opinions (codex), repo scaffolding (repo-bootstrap), image generation (gen-image), and GitHub profile READMEs (gh-profile).

plugins.name: slop-cop
plugins.description: Run slop-cop on a file to catch LLM-generated prose tells.

plugins.name: codex
plugins.description: Get a second opinion from OpenAI Codex CLI on hard debugging, analysis, or architecture problems, or generate images with its $imagegen skill.

plugins.name: repo-bootstrap
plugins.description: Bootstrap new projects and repos with base conventions plus an opinionated Python packaging layer.

plugins.name: llm-prompts
plugins.description: Guidance for writing effective LLM prompts and agent instructions, with current per-provider model notes.

plugins.name: writing-docs
plugins.description: Apply Diataxis modes, a technical-builder voice, and a slop-cop prose-lint pass when writing project documentation, READMEs, tutorials, how-tos, or reference.

plugins.name: gen-image
plugins.description: Generate project images — mascot logos, README banners (dark/light), social cards, illustrations — via the OpenAI Images API with local under-1MiB compression.

plugins.name: gh-profile
plugins.description: Create or refresh a fancy GitHub profile README from your real repos and activity — AI banner, snake animation, and cron Actions that keep it fresh.
